attacking_style: Not a personal attacker; operates as tactical facilitator and power-based lead-out rider on moderately sloped finishes.
team_tactics: Deployed as strategic domestique to either pace peloton when teammates are in breaks, or deliver extended lead-outs that allow sprinters to launch early on gradient finishes.
terrain_preference: Sloping finishes where sustained power output benefits team sprinters; flat to rolling terrain where tempo control is tactically valuable.
vulnerability: Not positioned as protected rider; role requires high work rate which limits personal opportunities in selective racing.
key_patterns: Functions as dual-purpose domestique: peloton pacer and lead-out specialist (2 observations).
Extended lead-outs enable teammates to launch earlier than typical sprint scenarios (2 observations).
Team deploys him for tempo control when protecting tactical positions (2 observations).
form_trajectory: unknown: limited observations show consistent domestique role execution but no recent data to assess trajectory
